query:
INSERT INTO resource_requirements
            (
                workflow_id
                ,name
                ,num_cpus
                ,num_gpus
                ,num_nodes
                ,memory
                ,runtime
                ,memory_bytes
                ,runtime_s
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
            RETURNING rowid
